common.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: View and update your data, security and available applications.
profile.personalDataHint: Name and email used for login and identification in the system.
profile.securityHint: Change your password periodically. Minimum 8 characters.
profile.myAppsHint: Modules enabled for your profile in SENAI HUB.
profile.noApps: No applications available for your profile. Contact the administrator.
profile.permissionsHint: Click "View details" to list allowed actions in Connect, Grid and Hub.
profile.passwordMinLength: The new password must be at least 8 characters.

settings.subtitle: Appearance and interface preferences. Account data, password and permissions are in My profile.
settings.profileShortcutDesc: Name, email, password, applications and permissions.
settings.themesShortcutDesc: Same wallpaper options on a full page.
settings.usersShortcutDesc: Account and role management in the Hub.
settings.interfaceHint: Local adjustments saved in this browser.
settings.reduceMotionDesc: Disables decorative transitions and animations for steadier navigation.
settings.notificationsHint: Alerts in the system bell and preferences by module.
settings.notificationsInAppDesc: Shows alerts in the bell (Hub, Connect, Grid and SAFE) when you are logged in.
settings.notificationsEmailDesc: Receive a summary of your responsibilities by email (SAFE, Connect and Grid).
settings.moduleConnectDesc: Classes, calendar, attendance, contracts and enrollments.
settings.languageHint: Choose a language and click Apply to translate the entire interface.
settings.localDataHint: Clear preferences stored only on this device, without changing your server account.
settings.draftsCleared: Report drafts removed from this browser.

appearance.wallpaperHint: Choose a preset theme or upload your own image (JPG, PNG or WebP, up to 5 MB). Preview appears on the full screen; click Save to apply in Hub, Connect, Grid and SAFE.
appearance.toneHint: Icons and panels adjust automatically to keep contrast and readability.
appearance.customImageHint: The photo is saved in this browser. Formats: JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF.

search.minChars: Type at least 2 characters. Shortcut: Ctrl+K

errors.notFoundBody: The address you entered does not exist or was moved. Return to the Hub to continue browsing.
errors.accessDeniedBody: You do not have permission to access this page. Check your profile or contact the administrator.
errors.accessDeniedFrom: Your profile does not have permission to access this area{{from}}. Ask the administrator if you need this access.

api.fallback: An error occurred. Please try again.
api.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.
api.networkError: Could not connect to the server. Check if the backend is running.
api.serverError: Internal server error. Please try again shortly.

authSidebar.tagline: The platform that connects students, teachers and content to turn learning into the future

supportChat.title: SENAI Support
supportChat.subtitle: Online now
supportChat.welcome: Hello! I'm the SENAI Hub support assistant. How can I help you today?
supportChat.autoReply: Thanks for your message! Our team will reply shortly. AI-powered support is coming soon.

themesPage.title: Themes
themesPage.subtitle: Customize the wallpaper and visual appearance of the system.

landing.heroTitle: Connect students, teachers and content to
landing.heroBody: SENAI Hub brings together applications and tools to boost professional and technological education — with simple, secure and centralized access.

features.title: Features that make a difference
features.subtitle: Technology at the service of professional and technological education.
features.hubDesc: All SENAI systems in a single access panel.
features.supportDesc: A team ready to help you at every step.
features.securityDesc: Protection and privacy aligned with best practices.
features.managementDesc: Indicators and reports for better decisions.

audience.title: Who is SENAI Hub for?
audience.subtitle: A solution designed for the entire school community — from students to managers.
audience.studentsDesc: Access content, track activities and stay connected to your learning journey in one place.
audience.teachersDesc: Manage classes, share materials and track student performance with tools built for you.
audience.adminDesc: Manage systems, users and school operations with real-time visibility and control.

platform.title: A complete platform for your daily work.
platform.body: The Hub brings together the systems you already use every day in a single access point. Fewer passwords, fewer clicks and more time for what matters: teaching and learning.

cta.title: Start turning education into the future today.
cta.body: Sign in with your account and access the best of SENAI professional and technological education.

preview.title: Application Hub
preview.subtitle: Access the systems available for your profile.

footer.tagline: Integrated platform for SENAI professional and technological education.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} SENAI — National Industrial Learning Service. All rights reserved.

archive.title: Historical archive
archive.subtitle: Browse finished classes, completed tickets, and archived SAFE authorizations.
archive.noAccess: Your profile cannot access the historical archive.
archive.empty: No archived records available for your profile.
archive.noRecords: No records found for this filter.
archive.footerHint: Data stays in the database — the archive only organizes closed records. Classes past end_date may auto-archive daily at 01:00.

autoArchive.pendingBody: {{count}} active class(es) past end date await archiving.

hubUsers.title: Users and access roles
hubUsers.subtitle: Create accounts without access and configure module, role and enabled tabs.
hubUsers.permissionsHint: Select only what this user can see. Displayed data respects the role scope.

spreadsheet.connectSubtitle: Download CSV templates, fill in Excel or LibreOffice and import in bulk. Accepts CSV and Excel (.xlsx).
spreadsheet.connectHint: Keys such as registration, class_code and course_code link records across spreadsheets.
spreadsheet.gridSubtitle: CSV templates for tickets, tasks, inventory and users. Accepts CSV and Excel (.xlsx).
spreadsheet.gridHint: Use ticket_code in tasks to link to an existing ticket.
spreadsheet.formatsHint: Formats: UTF-8 CSV with ; separator or Excel .xlsx. The first row must contain column names exactly as in the template.
spreadsheet.previewSummary: {{rows}} row(s) · estimate: {{created}} created, {{updated}} updated, {{errors}} with errors (simulation without saving).
spreadsheet.selectTable: Select a table on the left.

profileAvatar.title: Profile photo
profileAvatar.hint: JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF. Maximum 2 MB.
profileAvatar.emptyHint: Click "Choose image" to upload a new profile photo.
profileAvatar.invalidType: Use a JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF image.
profileAvatar.tooLarge: The image must be at most 2 MB.

builder.subtitle: Build your report by choosing sections, columns and filters. Export to CSV, Excel, JSON or PDF.
builder.noSavedPresets: No presets saved on the server.
builder.statusReady: Preview updated — export to CSV, Excel, JSON or PDF from the Export menu.
builder.statusIdle: Select a preset or configure sections and click Generate preview.

shared.noActivity: No tasks or tickets assigned to this user.

approveService.title: Approve service
approveService.body: As maintenance supervisor, confirm the service was performed correctly. After approval, the ticket goes to requester evaluation.

evaluateTicket.title: Evaluate service (requester)
evaluateTicket.body: Requester evaluation ({{requester}}). After saving, the ticket will be closed and remain available for reference.

createTaskFromTicket.title: New task from ticket
createTaskFromTicket.subtitle: Select an open ticket and define assignee and materials.

ticketControlPanel.saveError: Could not save. Check the data and try again.
ticketControlPanel.assignSubtitle: The ticket will move to Pending after saving.
ticketControlPanel.startSubtitle: Technician: {{technician}}. An in-progress task will be created.
ticketControlPanel.completeAndApprove: Complete task and send for approval
ticketControlPanel.approvalSubtitle: Confirm the service was performed correctly.
ticketControlPanel.finishedSubtitle: No pending actions. See history below.

inventoryPicker.noStock: No items with available stock at the moment.
inventoryPicker.zeroStock: Zero stock — cannot be used in this request.
inventoryPicker.hint: Zero-stock items cannot be selected. Low stock is flagged before reservation (when moving to In progress).
inventoryPicker.lowStockConfirmBody: Continue? Reservation occurs when moving the task to "In progress".

stockAlert.outOfStockBody: is out of stock. Remove the item or choose another — it cannot be reserved during execution.

reportPanel.title: Specific service report
reportPanel.subtitle: Select a ticket to view the full service history.

courseCard.defaultDescription: SENAI technical course with practical training aligned to industry demands.

rosterDrawer.addClassHint: Links the class to the course and imports all students enrolled in it.
rosterDrawer.importClassSuccess: Class {{className}}: {{enrolled}} of {{total}} student(s) enrolled in the course.
rosterDrawer.importClassError: Could not import students from the class.

charts.attendanceSubtitle: Current month — present, excused and unexcused absences
charts.presentHint: Students with attendance records in the period.
charts.noStudentsInCourses: No students enrolled in active courses.

viewer3d.hintMarkers: Drag to navigate · Click marker or block
viewer3d.hintBlocks: Drag to rotate · Scroll to zoom · Click block

ticketsPanel.emptyBlock: No tickets or tasks in {{block}} at the moment.
ticketsPanel.campusHint: Click a marker or block for details

blockPanel.selectBlockHint: Click a block to see associated tickets

peoplePanel.emptyBlock: No simulated people in {{block}} at the moment.
peoplePanel.clickMarkerHint: Click a marker or block for details

safeValidation.fillRegistrationNameClass: Fill in registration, name and class.
safeValidation.selectStudentOrNameClass: Select a student or enter name and class.

senai-dawn.description: Peach and light blue — glass-style reference.

senai-classic.name: SENAI Classic
senai-classic.description: Neutral with navy, red and soft blue orbs.

senai-cool.name: Industrial
senai-cool.description: Blues and grays with technical accent.

senai-warm.name: Energy
senai-warm.description: SENAI red, amber and soft navy.

senai-sunset.name: Sunset
senai-sunset.description: Orange, pink and purple at day's end.

senai-dark-navy.name: Night navy
senai-dark-navy.description: Deep SENAI blue — ideal for dark environments.

senai-dark-red.name: SENAI dark
senai-dark-red.description: Dark background with institutional red glow.

senai-neon.name: Technical neon
senai-neon.description: Dark with more intense colored orbs.
